member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownClaims
member.summary: Provides reusable claim types for test scenarios.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownIdentityProviders
member.summary: Supported identity providers for test scenarios. Order is intentional and mirrors production.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownPasswordBlacklist
member.summary: Centralized list of disallowed passwords that are too common or insecure.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownRoles
member.summary: Provides a centralized set of role names for test scenarios. Order is intentional: Admin > Member > Guest.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownTokens
member.summary: Provides static JWTs or token placeholders for test scenarios.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers
member.summary: Provides known users for test scenarios.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers.Default
member.summary: Gets the default test user for authentication scenarios.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers.Admin
member.summary: Gets the administrator test user for elevated access scenarios.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers.First(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the first known user names.
member.param: The number of user names to return.
member.returns: An array containing the first known user names.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers.Last(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the last known user names.
member.param: The number of user names to return.
member.returns: An array containing the last known user names.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Test.Data.KnownUsers.WithRole(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a test user with the specified role naming pattern.
member.param: The role to embed in the generated user identity.
